archiveworkspace.name: ArchiveWorkspace
archiveworkspace.description: Grants permission to archive a workspace

assumeconsole.name: AssumeConsole
assumeconsole.description: Grants permission to assume console access on Claude Platform

callwithbearertoken.name: CallWithBearerToken
callwithbearertoken.description: Grants permission to make API calls using bearer token authentication

cancelbatchinference.name: CancelBatchInference
cancelbatchinference.description: Grants permission to cancel an in-progress batch inference request

counttokens.name: CountTokens
counttokens.description: Grants permission to count tokens for a message request

createbatchinference.name: CreateBatchInference
createbatchinference.description: Grants permission to create a batch inference request

createfile.name: CreateFile
createfile.description: Grants permission to upload a file to a workspace

createinference.name: CreateInference
createinference.description: Grants permission to create a chat completion inference request

createskill.name: CreateSkill
createskill.description: Grants permission to create a skill in a workspace

createuserprofile.name: CreateUserProfile
createuserprofile.description: Grants permission to create a user profile in a workspace

createworkspace.name: CreateWorkspace
createworkspace.description: Grants permission to create a workspace in an organization

deletebatchinference.name: DeleteBatchInference
deletebatchinference.description: Grants permission to delete a batch inference request

deletefile.name: DeleteFile
deletefile.description: Grants permission to delete a file from a workspace

deleteskill.name: DeleteSkill
deleteskill.description: Grants permission to delete a skill from a workspace

getaccountstatus.name: GetAccountStatus
getaccountstatus.description: Grants permission to retrieve the status of account setup and AWS Marketplace registration

getbatchinference.name: GetBatchInference
getbatchinference.description: Grants permission to retrieve details of a batch inference request

getfile.name: GetFile
getfile.description: Grants permission to retrieve a file or its content from a workspace

getmodel.name: GetModel
getmodel.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about a specific model

getskill.name: GetSkill
getskill.description: Grants permission to retrieve details of a skill or its versions

getuserprofile.name: GetUserProfile
getuserprofile.description: Grants permission to retrieve details of a user profile

getworkspace.name: GetWorkspace
getworkspace.description: Grants permission to retrieve details of a workspace

listbatchinferences.name: ListBatchInferences
listbatchinferences.description: Grants permission to list batch inference requests in a workspace

listfiles.name: ListFiles
listfiles.description: Grants permission to list files in a workspace

listmodels.name: ListModels
listmodels.description: Grants permission to list available models in a workspace

listskills.name: ListSkills
listskills.description: Grants permission to list skills in a workspace

listuserprofiles.name: ListUserProfiles
listuserprofiles.description: Grants permission to list user profiles in a workspace

listworkspaces.name: ListWorkspaces
listworkspaces.description: Grants permission to list workspaces in an organization

updateskill.name: UpdateSkill
updateskill.description: Grants permission to create or delete a skill version

updateuserprofile.name: UpdateUserProfile
updateuserprofile.description: Grants permission to update a user profile in a workspace

updateworkspace.name: UpdateWorkspace
updateworkspace.description: Grants permission to update a workspace
